Title: Deems certain nominating or designating petitions to be permeated with fraud and invalidating the filings made by a contested candidate
Summary: Deems certain nominating or designating petitions to be permeated with fraud and invalidating the filings made by a contested candidate.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the election law, in relation to deeming certain nominating or designating petitions to be permeated with fraud and invalidating the filings made by a contested candidate
